case_title: NEVEO MOSSER VS. LLEWELLYN P STROHLIN JR et al

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-07-2005 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON FEB-07-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. JURY DEMAND WAS ORDERED STICKEN BY JUDGE PETER BUSCH WHEN DEFENDANT APPEARED IN 218 BUT THEN TOLD THE PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY THAT HE WAS NOT COMMING BACK AND DID NOT APPEAR AS ASSIGNED TO ROOM 303A TO HAVE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER. MICHAEL RAIFSNYDER, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK/ A. REDIGONDA; CAROL KAREN, CSR.

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-03-2005 - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AS ASSIGNED TO DPET. 303A. DEFT. APPEARED IN DEPT. 218 AT CALLING OF SETTLEMENT CALLENDAR AND THEN TOLD COUNSEL IN THE HALL WAY THAAT HE WAS LEAVING AND NOT COMMING BACK. MATTER REFERED TO DEPT. 210 JUDGE BUSCH TO STRIKE JURY DEMAND. D. CARTER, CLERK; SEE MINUTES OF DEPT. 210.
